meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: All my plans... brought to ruin...
Burn for me!
Give up the aegis or die!
If these false champions will not yield the aegis by choice... then they will surrender it in death!
Now the aegis is where it belongs!
Perish in never-ending flame!
The power is mine!
The aegis goes to its rightful owner!
quotes.transcript: Ha! The ages goes to its rightful owner!

quotes.text: Trial by fire!
quotes.transcript: Trial by fire!

quotes.text: No one stands in my way!
quotes.transcript: No one stands in my way!

quotes.text: You again? Do you really think you beat me with a legion at my side?
quotes.transcript: You again? Do you really think you beat me with a legion at my side?

quotes.text: You are too late, weakling! Even now, we break the dragons to serve us!
quotes.transcript: You are too late, weakling! Even now, we break the dragons to serve us!

quotes.text: Your ancient rites and rituals mean nothing to me, Yotna!
quotes.transcript: Your ancient rites and rituals mean nothing to me, Yotna!

quotes.text: Your suffering will be eternal!
quotes.transcript: Your suffering will be eternal!

quotes.text: Enough! I go tired of this!
quotes.transcript: Enough! I go tired of this!

quotes.text: Thousands of worlds will be mine to conquer!
quotes.transcript: Thousands of worlds will be mine to conquer!

quotes.text: Give up, fool! The bone speakers will never let an outsider be judged worthy!
quotes.transcript: Give up, fool! The bone speakers will never let an outsider be judged worthy!

quotes.text: Give up, outsider! You are not worthy of the Halls of Valor!
quotes.transcript: Give up, outsider! You are not worthy of the Halls of Valor!

quotes.text: Cower here in your cave, while it still stands!
quotes.transcript: Cower here in your cave, while it still stands!

quotes.text: I will not be stopped!
quotes.transcript: I will not be stopped!

quotes.text: Ah! Little more than a nuisance!
quotes.transcript: Ah! Little more than a nuisance!

quotes.text: By flame be scourged!
quotes.transcript: By flame be scourged!

quotes.text: You will die in agony!
quotes.transcript: You will die in agony!

quotes.text: My forces are limitless!
quotes.transcript: My forces are limitless!

quotes.text: Don't think you stand a chance simply because you have come this far! You are nothing! NOTHING!
quotes.transcript: Don't think you stand a chance simply because you have come this far! You are nothing! NOTHING!

quotes.text: The ages will be mine, you fools! And there's nothing you can do to stop me!
quotes.transcript: The ages will be mine, you fools! And there's nothing you can do to stop me!

quotes.text: Minions of Delegion! Destroy these worms!
quotes.transcript: Minions of Delegion! Destroy these worms!

quotes.text: Only I possess the power of a foreign year! The ages will be mine!
quotes.transcript: Only I possess the power of a foreign year! The ages will be mine!

quotes.text: I will conquer your trials and take the ages for my own!
quotes.transcript: I will conquer your trials and take the ages for my own!

quotes.text: No! I too have proved my worth, Odin! I am God King Scovald! These mortals dare not challenge my claim to the ages!
quotes.transcript: No! I too have proved my worth, Odin! I am God King Scovald! These mortals dare not challenge my claim to the ages!

quotes.text: You overestimated your skill!
quotes.transcript: You overestimated your skill!

quotes.text: Another obstacle removed!
quotes.transcript: Another obstacle removed!

quotes.text: You will not keep what you did not earn!
quotes.transcript: You will not keep what you did not earn!

quotes.text: Cry for mercy so the Legion may laugh!
quotes.transcript: Cry for mercy so the Legion may laugh!

quotes.text: A battle well fought! The path forward is open.
Do not let the gates fall!
I will be the judge now.
I will bleed the weakness from your veins!
Let your worth be measured in blood!
Storm drakes! At my side!
The blood of the unworthy will flow through these halls!
The undeserving will perish!
Very well. I will test your worth myself!
Our enemies are closer than we think.
quotes.transcript: Our enemies are closer than we think.

quotes.text: The Legion cannot hide from us.
quotes.transcript: The Legion cannot hide from us!

quotes.text: Speak, mortal.
quotes.transcript: Speak mortal!

quotes.text: If you only understood the implications of your actions!
quotes.transcript: If you only understood the implications of your actions.

quotes.text: The guard sees all! Knows all!
quotes.transcript: And I'll see you all, knows all!

quotes.text: I'm starting to question Odyn's choice.
quotes.transcript: I'm starting to question Odin's choice!

quotes.text: Do you ever give up?!
quotes.transcript: Do you ever give up?

quotes.text: Suit yourself!
quotes.transcript: So do yourself!

quotes.text: I am vigilant.
quotes.transcript: I am vigilant.

quotes.text: I serve Skyhold.
quotes.transcript: I serve Skyholt.

quotes.text: The battle is eternal.
quotes.transcript: The battle is eternal.

quotes.text: Our enemies are closer than we think.
quotes.transcript: Our enemies are closer than we think.

quotes.text: armies of old war, heed Odin's call!
quotes.transcript: armies of old war, heed Odin's call!

quotes.text: Resist! Fight to the last!
quotes.transcript: Resist! Fight to the last!

quotes.text: Well, Fort Champion, I yield to you!
quotes.transcript: Well, Fort Champion, I yield to you!

quotes.text: You've succeeded. I've opened up a portal for you to return. Hurry. I can only maintain it for so long.
quotes.transcript: You've succeeded. I've opened up a portal for you to return. Hurry. I can only maintain it for so long.

quotes.text: I will serve with honor.
quotes.transcript: I will serve with honor.

quotes.text: VALASHA! Defend these sacred halls!
quotes.transcript: VALASHA! Defend these sacred halls!

quotes.text: These halls remain pure.
quotes.transcript: These halls remain pure.

quotes.text: atmospheric In粉不品版本
quotes.transcript: atmospheric In粉不品版本

quotes.text: Shall we be lenient with these pets of yours, Odin?
quotes.transcript: Shall we be lenient with these pets of yours, Odin?

quotes.text: Only cowards fear the corner battle!
quotes.transcript: Only cowards fear the corner battle!

quotes.text: I am vigilant.
quotes.transcript: I am vigilant.

quotes.text: You are the other hand!
quotes.transcript: You are the other hand!

quotes.text: I am very close to stuffing the Rainbow Bridge somewhere painful!
quotes.transcript: I am very close to stuffing the Rainbow Bridge somewhere painful!

quotes.text: If you only understood the implications of your actions.
quotes.transcript: If you only understood the implications of your actions.

quotes.text: Drake Riders, come here!
quotes.transcript: Drake Riders, come here!

quotes.text: Drake Riders, I call upon your aid!
quotes.transcript: Drake Riders, I call upon your aid!

quotes.text: RALLI! RALLI!
quotes.transcript: RALLI! RALLI!

quotes.text: It is I who am unworthy.
quotes.transcript: It is I who am unworthy.

quotes.text: You have failed.
quotes.transcript: You have failed.

quotes.text: Your trial ends here!
quotes.transcript: Your trial ends here!

quotes.text: So it ends, the unworthy vanquished.
quotes.transcript: So it ends, the unworthy vanquished.

quotes.text: My video continues.
quotes.transcript: My video continues.

quotes.text: Is there truly valor in your heart?
quotes.transcript: Is there truly valor in your heart?

quotes.text: WEAK AS EXPECTED!
quotes.transcript: WEAK AS EXPECTED!

quotes.text: That one was too soft!
quotes.transcript: That one was too soft!

quotes.text: Begone from these hallowed halls!
I am sorry, Eyir... I have failed you...
I will not fail you, Eyir!
You will pollute these halls no more!
I will purge them from these sacred halls myself!
I am not nervous. Only... excited. All my life has led to this one glorious moment.
quotes.transcript: I am not nervous, only excited. All my life has led to this one glorious moment.

quotes.text: None can stand against Eyir's chosen!
quotes.transcript: None can stand against Aya's chosen!

quotes.text: You die as you lived: without honor.
quotes.transcript: You die as you lived, without honor.

quotes.text: It is done, Eyir! The sanctity of this place is preserved.
quotes.transcript: It is done, Eir! The sanctity of this place is preserved.

quotes.text: Eyir... you were wrong to put your faith in me...
quotes.transcript: Ayer, you were wrong to put your faith in me.

quotes.text: Fall in line!
quotes.transcript: Fall in line!

quotes.text: Stand together or die alone!
quotes.transcript: Stand together or die alone!

quotes.text: Hell you won't be as gentle as I!
quotes.transcript: Hell you won't be as gentle as I!

quotes.text: So be it! The unworthy shall be purged from the halls of Valar!
quotes.transcript: So be it! The unworthy shall be purged from the halls of Valar!

quotes.text: These mortals show promise.
quotes.transcript: These mortals show promise.

quotes.text: I accept this challenge... with eager anticipation!
Where they failed, we will succeed!
You have... bested me.
I will take joy in crushing you!
My strength... fails.
Together we will see our enemies to a savage end!
I embrace the abyss!
Together we will cast their souls to ruin!
Your cries of anguish will echo through eternity!
I deem you... unworthy.
Quickly! Let us put an end to these miscreants!
Seems I... underestimated you.
An agile mind is as deadly as the sharpest blade!
Be warned, champions: I will hold NOTHING back!
Behold! I bless you with my power.
It has been ages since I faced a worthy opponent. Let the battle begin!
Mighty Valarjar! Heed my summons!
Most impressive! I never thought I would meet anyone who could match the Valarjar's strength... and yet here you stand.
My power is beyond anything you have yet faced!
The vanquishers have already taken possession of it, Skovald, as was their right. Your protest comes too late.
There is one final trial that awaits: me. Should you triumph, I will carve your names in these sacred halls myself and grant you a reward worthy of your valor.

Throughout your trials, you have demonstrated strength, skill, and intellect-traits shared by the greatest of our vrykul kings. Now... you will face them in combat. Emerge victorious, and you may yet claim your prize!
To me, Valarjar! Prove your worth!
To the victor go the spoils... The Aegis of Aggramar is yours for the taking.
Yield now... or I will call upon my true power!
As for you, champion... well done. Well done!
Before you lies your next trial. Defeat both Hyrja and Fenryr and you will have proven your worth to me!
Champions! You have spilled the blood of Helya's minions. The time has come to enter Helheim itself and end the sea witch's dark reign. But first... a final challenge!
Enough! I... I yield! You are truly remarkable creatures. As promised, you will have your just reward.
Go forth, champion, and show this Burning Legion the fury of the Valarjar!
Hold nothing back! I must know they are ready for the task ahead.
Hymdall! Hyrja! Test the mettle of these mortals. I must be certain they possess the courage and skill needed for what is to come.
I share my power with you alone, champion. Bathe in the light of creation. Bask in the glory of the valorous!
It is done! Walk proudly this day and relish your victory.
It is good to see the Aegis of Aggramar safe from the likes of Skovald and his fel allies.
Long have I awaited noble champions to enter my realm. Behold! The Halls of Valor!
The Burning Legion dares to assault Stormheim! Remove their foul presence from this land, champion, and glory shall be yours!
The battle is yours to begin, heroes!
The mighty Fenryr stalks these grounds. It will take cunning and guile to slay this beast - a perfect test of your worthiness.
This place will test your mettle and, if you are found worthy, the Aegis of Aggramar will be yours!
You have earned my blessing, champions! I look forward to meeting you within the Hall of Glory!
You have truly impressed me. To pass these trials is a triumph, to do so with such speed makes of you a legend!
A magnificent battle. World Dunn Champion.
quotes.transcript: A magnificent battle. World Dunn Champion.

quotes.text: These new challengers seek to complete the trials you have bested. Show them how a true champion fights.
quotes.transcript: These new challengers seek to complete the trials you have bested. Show them how a true champion fights.

quotes.text: Whether you taught them their place in this life now, then they delude themselves further.
quotes.transcript: Whether you taught them their place in this life now, then they delude themselves further.

quotes.text: Loads of Naga have crawled forth from their dark halls beneath the sea. I cannot abide the presence of such corrupt beasts. Show them the meaning of honorable battle!
quotes.transcript: Loads of Naga have crawled forth from their dark halls beneath the sea. I cannot abide the presence of such corrupt beasts. Show them the meaning of honorable battle!

quotes.text: We must not suffer hellia's minions to gain territory un-fought. Your loyalty will be rewarded.
quotes.transcript: We must not suffer hellia's minions to gain territory un-fought. Your loyalty will be rewarded.

quotes.text: Champion, a great malevolence has risen in the mists. Gather your most powerful allies and meet the Kaval Deer in battle.
quotes.transcript: Champion, a great malevolence has risen in the mists. Gather your most powerful allies and meet the Kaval Deer in battle.

quotes.text: Even my most loyal vrykul dare not enter the mists, for fear of their souls. I commend your bravery mortal.
quotes.transcript: Even my most loyal vrykul dare not enter the mists, for fear of their souls. I commend your bravery mortal.

quotes.text: Naga are vile creatures and dangerous if left unchecked. The death you gave them was more noble than they deserved.
quotes.transcript: Naga are vile creatures and dangerous if left unchecked. The death you gave them was more noble than they deserved.

quotes.text: Well done. I remember the one whom this village owes its name. He was a fine leader.
quotes.transcript: Well done. I remember the one whom this village owes its name. He was a fine leader.

quotes.text: Your allies spill the blood of their rivals upon the field of battle. Join them and prove your valor!
quotes.transcript: Your allies spill the blood of their rivals upon the field of battle. Join them and prove your valor!

quotes.text: Well thought! You have shown yourself to be worthy!
quotes.transcript: Well thought! You have shown yourself to be worthy!

quotes.text: Hero, once more you have proven your valor to me!
quotes.transcript: Hero, once more you have proven your valor to me!

quotes.text: Our fail is a foe worth fighting. Prove your valor! Slay the beast and my reward is yours!
quotes.transcript: Our fail is a foe worth fighting. Prove your valor! Slay the beast and my reward is yours!

quotes.text: Only by strength in battle can you be measured a champion! Let my Stormforge begin your test.
quotes.transcript: Only by strength in battle can you be measured a champion! Let my Stormforge begin your test.

quotes.text: Throughout the ages, the legends of my Stormforged champions have spurred warriors to greatness. Go forth and learn these tales that you might be so inspired.
quotes.transcript: Throughout the ages, the legends of my Stormforged champions have spurred warriors to greatness. Go forth and learn these tales that you might be so inspired.

quotes.text: You have proven yourself the greatest living warrior on Azeroth. It is for this reason I have saved you.
quotes.transcript: You have proven yourself the greatest living warrior on Azeroth. It is for this reason I have saved you.

quotes.text: I name you, Val'azha! Bring glory to these halls, on the wings of my Valkyr!
quotes.transcript: I name you, Val'azha! Bring glory to these halls, on the wings of my Valkyr!

quotes.text: Among the souls you have rescued, there are some who wish to regain their honor fighting alongside you against the Cavaldeer.
quotes.transcript: Among the souls you have rescued, there are some who wish to regain their honor fighting alongside you against the Cavaldeer.

quotes.text: Honourless Merlots have overtaken the village of Malheim. I cannot abide their presence in that one sacred place. Erraticate this filth!
quotes.transcript: Honourless Merlots have overtaken the village of Malheim. I cannot abide their presence in that one sacred place. Erraticate this filth!

quotes.text: Earl Nark is a misshapen pest. Long has this effing poached the field of the Eternal Hunt. Put an end to his troublemaking.
quotes.transcript: Earl Nark is a misshapen pest. Long has this effing poached the field of the Eternal Hunt. Put an end to his troublemaking.

quotes.text: Thank you, mortal. Elnok will poach these fields no longer.
quotes.transcript: Thank you, mortal. Elnok will poach these fields no longer.

quotes.text: Knowledge is but the first step. Only when these tales roar within your heart will you become a hero worthy of our legacy.
quotes.transcript: Knowledge is but the first step. Only when these tales roar within your heart will you become a hero worthy of our legacy.

quotes.text: These aids will make a fine present to the fear. The scars you earn collected them, mark you a true champion. Well done!
quotes.transcript: These aids will make a fine present to the fear. The scars you earn collected them, mark you a true champion. Well done!

quotes.text: I seek to forge an alliance with the fear of the mighty Drake of Stormhine. Collect a clutch of eggs for my own brood, so that I might make a gift of them. Be wary though, the brood mothers do not abide anyone poking around their nests.
quotes.transcript: I seek to forge an alliance with the fear of the mighty Drake of Stormhine. Collect a clutch of eggs for my own brood, so that I might make a gift of them. Be wary though, the brood mothers do not abide anyone poking around their nests.

quotes.text: I have foreseen the coming of a mighty champion to these shores, one who would slay countless foes and prove their valour time and again, one who would lead my armies to victory against the great darkness that seeks to devour this world!
quotes.transcript: I have foreseen the coming of a mighty champion to these shores, one who would slay countless foes and prove their valour time and again, one who would lead my armies to victory against the great darkness that seeks to devour this world!

quotes.text: The Light shines eternal in you, Hyrja!
You will not deny Hyrja's ascendance!
Mortal intruders approach!
Hyrja... the fury of the storm is yours to command!
You sully this ritual with your presence, mortals!
Spoken like a true val'kyr.
channel Play subscribe
quotes.transcript: channel Play subscribe

quotes.text: Thanks for watching!
quotes.transcript: Thanks for watching!
